series_metadata.series_description: Records may include OOD Strike/Work Stoppage Plan for all OOD offices for management to follow along supporting documents. This report is updated every three years.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for three (3) years until superseded, deleted, or updated by new report. Destroy outdated report. ; Electronic: Retain for three (3) years until superseded, deleted, or updated by new report. Destroy outdated report., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
